languages.text: {n}Ирлиэт неподвижно стоит с закрытыми глазами, скрестив руки на груди. Ее спокойствие почти неестественно.{/n} "Магия огиров лежит за пределами понимания вашего рода, элантах. Чтобы противостоять ей, последнее, что тебе стоит делать — это проявлять излишнюю горячность".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ирлиэт неподвижно стоит с закрытыми глазами, скрестив руки на груди. Ее спокойствие почти неестественно.{/n} "Магия огиров лежит за пределами понимания вашего рода, элантах. Чтобы противостоять ей, последнее, что тебе стоит делать — это проявлять излишнюю горячность".
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."
languages.original_text: {n}Ирлиэт неподвижно стоит с закрытыми глазами, скрестив руки на груди. Ее спокойствие почти неестественно.{/n} "Магия огиров лежит за пределами понимания вашего рода, элантах. Чтобы противостоять ей, последнее, что тебе стоит делать — это проявлять излишнюю горячность".

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

{n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

{n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

languages.text: {n}伊莉耶特闭着眼，双臂交叉，一动不动地站着。她那份平静有些不自然。{/n}“遗落者的魔法，超出了你们种族的理解范畴，外界人。你若是想对抗它，最不该做的就是乱发脾气。”
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊莉耶特闭着眼，双臂交叉，一动不动地站着。她那份平静有些不自然。{/n}“遗落者的魔法，超出了你们种族的理解范畴，外界人。你若是想对抗它，最不该做的就是乱发脾气。”

languages.text: {n}Yrliet se tient immobile, les yeux fermés et les bras croisés sur la poitrine. Elle affiche une sérénité quasi surnaturelle.{/n} « La magie des Oghyrs dépasse l'entendement de votre espèce, elantach. Si vous voulez y résister, perdre votre sang-froid est la dernière chose à faire. »
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet se tient immobile, les yeux fermés et les bras croisés sur la poitrine. Elle affiche une sérénité quasi surnaturelle.{/n} « La magie des Oghyrs dépasse l'entendement de votre espèce, elantach. Si vous voulez y résister, perdre votre sang-froid est la dernière chose à faire. »

languages.text: {n}Yrliet gözleri kapalı, kollarını kavuşturmuş hâlde hareketsiz duruyor. Sükûneti doğallıktan uzak.{/n} "Oghyr büyüsü, türünün idrak sınırlarının ötesindedir elantach. Ona karşı koymayı umuyorsan öfkene boyun eğmek, düşeceğin en büyük hatadır."
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet gözleri kapalı, kollarını kavuşturmuş hâlde hareketsiz duruyor. Sükûneti doğallıktan uzak.{/n} "Oghyr büyüsü, türünün idrak sınırlarının ötesindedir elantach. Ona karşı koymayı umuyorsan öfkene boyun eğmek, düşeceğin en büyük hatadır."

languages.text: {n}Yrliet permanece inmóvil, con los ojos cerrados y los brazos cruzados. Su serenidad no parece natural.{/n} «La magia de los Oghyr va más allá de la comprensión de tu gente, elantach. Si tienes intención de resistirla, ceder a tus emociones es lo último que quieres hacer».
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet permanece inmóvil, con los ojos cerrados y los brazos cruzados. Su serenidad no parece natural.{/n} «La magia de los Oghyr va más allá de la comprensión de tu gente, elantach. Si tienes intención de resistirla, ceder a tus emociones es lo último que quieres hacer».

languages.text: {n}Yrliet steht mit geschlossenen Augen und verschränkten Armen regungslos neben dir. Ihr Gleichmut ist fast unnatürlich.{/n} "Oghyr-Magie liegt außerhalb des Verständnisses Eurer Art, Elantach. Um Ihr zu widerstehen, solltet Ihr auf keinen Fall Eurem Temperament nachgeben."
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yrliet steht mit geschlossenen Augen und verschränkten Armen regungslos neben dir. Ihr Gleichmut ist fast unnatürlich.{/n} "Oghyr-Magie liegt außerhalb des Verständnisses Eurer Art, Elantach. Um Ihr zu widerstehen, solltet Ihr auf keinen Fall Eurem Temperament nachgeben."

languages.text: {n}イルリエットは目を閉じて両手を組んで動かない。彼女の静けさはまるで不自然なもののように思える。{/n}「オグイヤーの魔法は、あなたの種族の理解を超えたものだ、エランタチ。それを拒む望みがあるなら、怒りに身を任せることは、決してすべきではない。」
languages.original_text: {n}Yrliet stands motionless with her eyes closed and arms folded. Her serenity is almost unnatural.{/n} "Oghyr magic lies beyond the bounds of your kind's understanding, elantach. If you hope to resist it, giving in to your temper is the last thing you should be doing."

traits.locale_text: {n}イルリエットは目を閉じて両手を組んで動かない。彼女の静けさはまるで不自然なもののように思える。{/n}「オグイヤーの魔法は、あなたの種族の理解を超えたものだ、エランタチ。それを拒む望みがあるなら、怒りに身を任せることは、決してすべきではない。」
